final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster inspired by the aesthetic of 大话西游, reimagined in 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s 港片 film aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a romantic embrace as the central focal point, with two figures in the distance behind
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 kissing/embracing against a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, emotionally charged 90s Hong Kong film atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking 90s Hong Kong cinema — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain / 胶片颗粒 texture throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
